nasb.text: “Ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; knock, and it will be opened to you.

esv.text: “Ask,     and it will be given to you;     seek, and you will find;     knock, and it will be opened to you.

cnv.text: “你們祈求，就給你們；尋找，就尋見；叩門，就給你們開門。

ccb.text: “祈求，就会给你们；寻找，就会寻见；叩门，就会给你们开门。

csbs.text: “不断祈求吧，就会给你们；不断寻找吧，就会找到；不断敲门吧，就会为你们开门。
